page_header.subtitle: Say Hello
page_header.title: Get in Touch
page_header.description: Whether you want to join us, book tickets, or just ask a question — we'd love to hear from you.

join_box.heading: Want to Join?
join_box.text: We're always welcoming new members — whether you want to act, direct, build sets, manage costumes, do lighting, or just help out on show nights. No experience necessary. Just drop us an email and we'll be in touch.
